anu-√smṛ to remember, recollect:
Caus. P. -smārayati, or -smarayati, to remind (with acc.),  Kir. v, 14.

results.rendered_html:
anusmṛ 1 P. To remember, think of, call to mind, recollect (with acc. or gen.); varaprārthanāmanusmṛtya  Ś. 1 ; yadaiva anusmṛtaṃ devena  Ś. 7 ; tasmātsarveṣu kāleṣu māmanusmara yudhya ca  Bg. 8. 7 ; vyapagatamadarāgasyānusasmāra lakṣmīṃ  Ki. 4. 38. 
— Caus. To remind (painfully), cause to remember with regret;  Ki. 5. 14.
